description: Open-source MCP server connecting Claude to Filevine practice management. Built by Oktopeak.
name: io.github.oktopeak/filevine-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Filevine OAuth client ID (from Settings → Client Secrets)
environmentVariables.name: FILEVINE_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Filevine OAuth client secret (from Settings → Client Secrets)
environmentVariables.name: FILEVINE_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Filevine Personal Access Token (from Settings → Access Tokens)
environmentVariables.name: FILEVINE_PAT

environmentVariables.description: 64-character hex string (32 bytes) for AES-256-GCM token encryption
environmentVariables.name: ENCRYPTION_KEY
